composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
SIGNAL STATE: NO_ACTION

Bitcoin remains in a confirmed bear market 19.4% below its 200-day moving average, with structural risk conditions now active. The 49.3% drawdown from the one-year high exceeds the structural filter threshold of 35%, and 30-day realized volatility at 34% remains below the 40% floor. Under these conditions, backtest data shows zero positive episodes at 120 days with a median loss of 26%. The z-score of -0.95 does not approach crisis entry levels. No entry is indicated.

The structural filters are blocking all signals. Realized volatility compression combined with the magnitude of the drawdown from peak signals a sustained market break rather than a recoverable panic. ETH and SOL show similar positioning with z-scores between -1.15 and -1.58. Funding remains positive but is contextual only. Stand aside until either structural conditions reset or z-score drops below -3.0 with BEAR phase intact - at which point backtest forward returns reach 29% at 120 days.
